🌍👨🏻‍🍳 FLAVOURS OF THE WORLD CUP ⚽️🏆 Welcome to my brand new series, where I’ll be cooking my way through the World Cup, one game at a time 🍽️ Two countries competing become one unexpected recipe shared - to celebrate the world’s most iconic flavours 🤤 This summer, I’ll be turning football fixtures into fusion recipes inspired by both nations - learning more about the ingredients, food traditions + football cultures of each country along the way 🌎 From Harissa Miso Ramen (Tunisia 🇹🇳 x Japan 🇯🇵) to Jacket Potatoes with a Twist (England 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 x Croatia 🇭🇷), and Lahmacun My Way (Turkey 🇹🇷 x USA 🇺🇸), we’ve got some VERY tasty combinations coming up 👀 In each episode, I’ll be rating each dish out of 100, predicting every match, and after the group stage, the results will decide what I cook during the knockouts 🏆 Football can divide us, but food brings us together 🙏 Let me know who you’re supporting in the comments below 👇 I hope you’re as excited as I am! ❤️ Alfie x #worldcup #worldcup2026 #fusionfood #easyrecipes #footballfood

Scallion pancake kbbq crunchwrap >> Taco Bell RECIPE ⬇️ * Frozen jumbo scallion pancakes * Bulgogi (I used pre-marinated) * Kimchi, roughly chopped * Shredded mozzarella * Cucumber, julienned * Scallions, sliced * Jalapeño, sliced  * Crispy fried onions * Spicy corn cheese Spicy corn cheese:  * Corn * Cream cheese * Mayo * Shredded mozzarella * Buldak sauce 1. For each crunch wrap, thaw 2 scallion pancakes. Once thawed, leave one full size and for the other cut out a smaller circle about 1 inch smaller than the original. 2. Cook your bulgogi until desired doneness and set aside to cool. 3. Briefly stir fry chopped up kimchi to evaporate excess liquid and slightly caramelize. 4. Mix together ingredients for the spicy corn cheese. Use more cream cheese than mayo. 5. On the larger pancake, assemble starting with a layer of corn cheese, shredded mozzarella, bulgogi, more mozzarella, scallions, jalapeños, kimchi, cucumbers, and crispy fried onions on top. 6. Cover with the smaller pancake and fold around until it’s completely closed. 7. Pan fry with plenty of oil on medium-low heat for 8-10 min per side, or until golden brown and crispy and the sides are translucent. #crunchwrap #scallionpancake #asianfusion #kbbq

A owner just finished giving their cat a bath and took it to bask in the sun on the stone steps. With its two little paws covering its face, it looks incredibly soft, cute, and adorable. Netizens commented, "The sunshine falling on it looks so warm and beautiful." 🇨🇳「民胞物与，念兹在兹。」 —— 张载 🇬🇧 “People are my compatriots, and things are my fellows; keep this thought constantly in mind.” —— Zhang Zai 🇨🇳 类似案例： 🇬🇧 Similar cases: 🇨🇳 在江苏苏州的一个老弄堂里，一位阿婆给收养的小流浪狗洗完澡后，把它抱到竹椅上晒太阳。小狗刚换上了干净的毛发，在午后温暖的阳光下舒服地眯起了眼睛，还时不时用小脑袋在阿婆的手心上蹭来蹭去。阳光透过斑驳的树影洒在它们身上，周围的邻居路过时都忍不住驻足观看，纷纷赞叹这一幕充满了生活的美好与温情。 🇬🇧 In an old alley in Suzhou, Jiangsu, an old grandmother washed a rescued stray puppy and placed it on a bamboo chair to bask in the sun. With clean fur, the puppy comfortably squinted in the warm afternoon sunlight, rubbing its head against her palm. Sunlight filtered through the trees onto them, and passing neighbors couldn't help but stop to admire the warmth. 🇨🇳 四川成都的一个创意园区内，一只咖啡馆养的小橘猫在刚洗完澡后，被店员放在白色的石阶上晾干。小家伙面对刺眼的阳光，伸出肉乎乎的前爪搭在眼睛上，就像是在和阳光玩捉迷藏。这一幕吸引了许多正在喝咖啡的年轻顾客，大家纷纷拿出手机记录下这极其治愈的瞬间，小橘猫的软萌憨态很快便传遍了社交网络。 🇬🇧 Inside a creative park in Chengdu, Sichuan, a small orange cat belonging to a café was placed on white stone steps by a staff member to dry after a bath. Facing the bright sun, the little one stretched out its chubby front paws over its eyes, playing hide-and-seek with the light. This scene attracted young customers who quickly used their phones to capture the healing moment. 🇨🇳 在安徽合肥的一个居民小区阳台上，一位年轻女孩正带着她刚洗完澡的长毛猫坐在垫子上享受日光浴。阳光斜斜地照进阳台，小猫舒服地躺在主人的大腿上，翻滚着身体露出毛茸茸的肚皮，两只前爪还不断地在空中抓挠，显得无比满足。这种人与宠物之间纯粹而又安静的陪伴，在午后的金色光线里构成了一幅极其温馨安详的画面。 🇬🇧 On a residential balcony in Hefei, Anhui, a young girl sat on a mat with her long-haired cat enjoying a sunbath right after its wash. The sun beamed across the balcony as the kitten lay comfortably on her lap, rolling over to show its fluffy belly and paddling its paws in the air. This quiet companionship formed an incredibly peaceful picture in the golden afternoon light. #爱 #猫咪日常 #治愈瞬间 #生活美好 #萌宠 #Love #CatDaily #HealingMoment #BeautifulLife #CutePet

Why you should uncrust your crusty dog! 🫣 Leaving too much buildup on your dog for too long can cause irritation and discomfort for your pet. The best way to prevent this is with regular grooming, keeping the eyes clean and cleared, cleaning around the eyes daily with pet friendly eye wipes, and finding the source of the irritant. It’s also beneficial to look into things that support healthy tear production like filtered water and supplements. Always make sure to use a gentle facial cleanser to avoid irritating their eyes and face. My personal fav is @tropiclean Blueberry Facial - it’s a great way to gently and throughly clean your pet’s face. #dog #doggrooming #tips #cutedog #catthedoggroomer

🔥🌽 Chipotle Steak Street Corn Protein Bowl Save this because this one is INSANE 🤤🔥 📕 DM me “cookbook” and I’ll send you the link to 225+ high-protein recipes with full macros, sauces, and meal prep ideas 🙌🏻 ⸻ 🛒 What you need (4 servings) 🥩 Chipotle Steak • 1.5 lbs NY or sirloin steak (for a leaner option) , cut into bite-sized cubes  • 1 tbsp olive oil • 1 tsp chili powder • 1 tsp smoked paprika • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp cumin • Juice of 1 lime • Salt & pepper to taste 🥔 Potatoes • 800g russet potatoes, diced • 1 tbsp olive oil • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp smoked paprika • Salt & pepper 🌽 Street Corn Mix • 2 cups corn • ½ cup non-fat Greek yogurt • 2 tbsp light mayo • Juice of 1 lime • ¼ cup cotija cheese • ½ tsp chili powder • Salt to taste 🌶️ Chipotle Cilantro Crema • ½ cup non-fat Greek yogurt • 1 tbsp light mayo • 1 chipotle pepper in adobo • 1 tsp adobo sauce • Juice of ½ lime • 1 garlic clove • Handful fresh cilantro • Splash of water to thin • Salt to taste 🌿 Optional Toppings • Pickled red onions • Fresh cilantro • Avocado slices • Extra lime wedges ⸻ 👨🏻‍🍳 Directions 1. Toss your potatoes with olive oil and seasonings, then air fry at 400°F until crispy and golden. 2. While the potatoes cook, season the steak with all listed seasonings and lime juice. Sear in a hot skillet until browned and cooked to your liking. 3. Mix together all street corn ingredients until creamy. 4. Add all chipotle crema ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth. 5. Build your bowls with potatoes, street corn, steak, pickled onions, avocado, and a generous drizzle of the chipotle cilantro crema. ⸻ 💪 Estimated Macros Per Bowl Calories: 565 Protein: 51g Carbs: 42g Fat: 18g #highproteinbowls #mealprepideas #steakbowl #macrofriendly #highproteinrec

Even if you love cooking for your family, some nights you just run out of energy! When I need a break from the kitchen, my husband takes over to make his absolute favorite weeknight comfort meal. This one-pan ground beef and potato dinner is a lifesaver for busy evenings. It is incredibly hearty, rich in flavor, and completely foolproof. Everything simmers together in a single pot to create a perfectly cozy, homestyle meal. It is made with simple, everyday ingredients—and while the recipe calls for beef broth, using water works perfectly fine too, making it an easy option to throw together with whatever you have on hand. Whether you are feeding hungry kids, looking for a lazy dinner idea, or just craving classic comfort food, this savory skillet hits the spot every single time. Topics covered in this video: Easy one-pan dinners for busy weeknights Hearty ground beef and potato recipes Lazy dinner ideas that actually taste good Simple one-pot comfort food Quick family meals with ground beef Ingredients:  1 lb (450 g) ground beef 2 tablespoons butter or olive oil 1 medium onion 2 cloves garlic 1 tablespoon tomato paste 2 medium carrots, sliced 4 medium potatoes 1 tablespoon all-purpose flour 4 cups (960ml) beef broth 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce — optional, but adds depth 1 bay leaf ½ teaspoon dried thyme or a few fresh thyme sprigs ½ teaspoon salt, or to taste ½ teaspoon black pepper 1–2 tablespoons fresh parsley

d: Made with Marcangelo Mild Italian Sausage from @foodlion, this one comes together so easily but tastes like something you'd order at a restaurant. The sausage brings so much flavor, and the creamy garlic parmesan sauce ties everything together perfectly. Quick recipe: Cook Marcangelo sausage until browned, then remove. In the same pan, sauté butter, shallots, and garlic. Season with dried oregano, garlic salt, and Kinder's Butter seasoning. Add heavy cream and a splash of pasta water and let it simmer until slightly thickened. Toss in cooked rigatoni, add the sausage back in, and mix until coated. Finish with Parmesan cheese and red pepper flakes. Save this for your next cozy dinner night and grab your ingredients on your next Food Lion run. #pasta #pastarecipe #dinnerideas #easyrecipes #sponsored

Soft Fluffy Cloud Cake Recipe 👇 A light, airy egg white cake with a soft cloud-like texture. Simple ingredients, quick baking time, and a delicate finish. Ingredients 3 egg whites A little white vinegar Fine sugar, added gradually Optional: vanilla extract, if you want a softer egg flavour Equipment Mixing bowl Electric hand mixer or stand mixer Baking sheet Parchment paper Toothpick Directions Prepare the egg whites Separate 3 egg whites into a clean, dry mixing bowl. Make sure there is no yolk in the bowl. Even a small amount of yolk can stop the whites from whipping properly. Add vinegar Add a little white vinegar. This helps reduce the eggy smell and makes the egg whites more stable. Add sugar and beat Add the fine sugar gradually while beating. Beat until the meringue becomes thick, glossy, and firm. It is ready when it is stiff enough to hold a toothpick upright. Shape the cake Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Spoon the meringue onto the sheet and shape it into a round mound. Keep it tall and smooth so it bakes into a soft cloud shape. Bake Bake at 160°C / 320°F for 20 minutes. Serve Let it cool slightly before serving. The result should be soft, fluffy, light, and cloud-like. Important tips Use a clean, dry bowl. Do not let any egg yolk get into the whites. Add the sugar gradually. Beat until the meringue can hold a toothpick upright. Do not overbake, or the cake can become dry. #cookingathometiktoktv #cakerecipe #easyrecipe #yummyfood

🎀 LAZY GIRL DINNER 🎀 One pot creamy paprika beef pasta 🍝  Ingredients: 350g rigatoni (uncooked)  200ml double cream 600ml beef stock  1 cup tomato passata  2 tbs tomato paste  1 tbs smoked paprika 1 tsp cayenne pepper 1 1/2 tbs Italian herbs 2 tsp chilli flakes (optional) 1 brown onion, finely diced 4 garlic cloves, minced  500g beef mince (I used 15% fat) Salt & pepper, to taste  Method:  * On a medium to high heat add your olive oil to your pan before frying off your beef mince until brown. Add in your spices, onion and garlic and stir until softened and fragrant (about 5 minutes). * Add your tomato paste and stir through until combined - cook for about 2 minutes. * Add your passata and cook through for an additional 5 minutes before adding your stock, cream and finally your rigatoni. Stir through until the rigatoni is lightly covered by the liquid. * Turn heat down to medium/low and place lid on for 15 minutes or until til cooked through.  * Remove lid and stir through your Parmesan and serve 😊
